_comment: Entity-level EBITDA adjustments. Entity field uses 'entity_a' or 'entity_b' — resolved to actual entity names at runtime from the engagement config.

entity_adjustments.name: Above-market exec compensation — {entity_a}
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Executive compensation analysis vs. industry benchmarks
entity_adjustments.rationale: {entity_a} CEO/CFO compensation $18M above market median for comparable firms.

entity_adjustments.name: Above-market exec compensation — {entity_b}
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Executive compensation analysis vs. industry benchmarks

entity_adjustments.name: Non-recurring: {entity_a_short} litigation reserve
entity_adjustments.rationale: One-time litigation reserve for patent infringement case settled in Q3.

entity_adjustments.name: Non-recurring: {entity_b_short} delivery center closure
entity_adjustments.rationale: One-time charge for Manila delivery center closure and staff transition.

entity_adjustments.name: Transaction costs — this deal ({entity_a})
entity_adjustments.rationale: {entity_a}-side investment banking, legal, and accounting fees for this transaction.

entity_adjustments.name: Transaction costs — this deal ({entity_b})
entity_adjustments.rationale: {entity_b}-side advisory and legal fees for this transaction.

entity_adjustments.name: Related-party leases — {entity_b_short} founder properties
entity_adjustments.rationale: {entity_b} leases 2 properties from founder entity at above-market rates; $4M annual excess.

entity_adjustments.name: Run-rate: new contracts not at full revenue ({entity_a})
entity_adjustments.support_reference: {entity_a} backlog analysis — contracts signed but not fully ramped
entity_adjustments.rationale: 3 large contracts signed in Q3-Q4 not yet at full run-rate revenue.

entity_adjustments.name: Run-rate: new contracts not at full revenue ({entity_b})
entity_adjustments.support_reference: {entity_b} backlog analysis — contracts signed but not fully ramped
entity_adjustments.rationale: 2 BPM engagements ramping to full headcount in Q1-Q2 2026.

entity_adjustments.name: Utilization normalization — {entity_a_short} Q2-Q3 dip
entity_adjustments.support_reference: {entity_a} utilization reports — Q2/Q3 2025 vs. trailing 8-quarter avg
entity_adjustments.rationale: Q2-Q3 utilization dipped to 73% vs. normalized 78%; add-back for temporary bench buildup.

entity_adjustments.name: Offshore labor mix shift — {entity_b_short} in progress
entity_adjustments.rationale: {entity_b} migrating 15% of onshore delivery to offshore; $12M annualized savings at completion.

entity_adjustments.name: {entity_b_short} attrition normalization 18% to 15%
entity_adjustments.support_reference: {entity_b} HR metrics — attrition trending down from 18% to 15% target
entity_adjustments.rationale: {entity_b} attrition at 18% vs. 15% industry norm; excess recruiting/training cost add-back.

combination_synergies.name: Bench optimization — consulting
combination_synergies.support_reference: Bench utilization analysis — 4500 consultants x cross-deploy model
combination_synergies.rationale: Cross-deploying {entity_a} bench consultants onto {entity_b} delivery engagements.

combination_synergies.name: Bench optimization — delivery
combination_synergies.support_reference: Delivery bench analysis — 4200 FTEs x cross-deploy model
combination_synergies.rationale: Redeploying idle {entity_b} delivery FTEs onto {entity_a} project support roles.

combination_synergies.name: Corporate function consolidation
combination_synergies.support_reference: People overlap analysis — Finance, HR, IT, Legal functions
combination_synergies.rationale: Consolidating overlapping corporate functions; reduction based on min(A,B) headcount per function.

combination_synergies.name: Vendor consolidation
combination_synergies.support_reference: Vendor overlap analysis — overlapping vendors with consolidation savings
combination_synergies.rationale: Consolidating overlapping vendor contracts for volume discounts and eliminated redundancy.

combination_synergies.name: Technology redundancy elimination
combination_synergies.support_reference: Technology stack audit — overlapping SaaS, middleware, and dev tools
combination_synergies.rationale: Eliminating duplicate SaaS licenses, middleware, and internal tools post-combination.

combination_synergies.name: Cross-sell revenue contribution
combination_synergies.support_reference: Cross-sell pipeline — high-confidence ACV x capture rate x margin x ramp
combination_synergies.rationale: EBITDA contribution from cross-selling services to the other entity's non-overlapping clients.

combination_synergies.name: Integration costs Year 1
combination_synergies.support_reference: Integration management office budget — systems, people, branding
combination_synergies.rationale: Year 1 integration costs: IT system migration, org redesign, rebranding, change management.

combination_synergies.name: Retention packages
combination_synergies.support_reference: Retention program — key talent across both entities
combination_synergies.rationale: Year 1 retention bonuses for critical leadership and top performers.
